seriess.title: 12-Month Moving Average of Unweighted Median Hourly Wage Growth: Education: Associates Degree
seriess.notes:
Median of the year-over-year percent change in hourly wage rates computed at the individual level using linked wage records. Reported as a 12-month moving average. Associates Degree denotes the highest level of education is an Associates Degree.

For more details about this release from the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta, visit their Wage Growth Tracker webpage (https://www.atlantafed.org/chcs/wage-growth-tracker?panel=2).
